name: Monspeet
description: __Height:__ 182 cm (5'11") Monspeet is a demon who is a member of the Ten Commandments, a group of elite warriors of the Demon Clan handpicked by the Demon King himself. He was sealed away along with the rest of the clan in the Coffin of Eternal Darkness until he was set free by Hendrickson.

name: Na-Kyum Baek
description: __Height:__ 174 cm Abandoned as a child, he was raised at the house of Ki-Saeng. A talented painter, he would come to paint erotic themed art under a pseudonym before leaving that to live as a drunk. He feels all the nobles are only noble in appearance after getting to know Seung-Ho. Painting from memory, he ends up tearing his creation after considering it filthy.

She was rescued by The Bow Hero, whom she would later devote her life to. ~!To show her gratitude and support for her savior, Rishia would go on to join Itsuki's party. name: Shuu Inuzuka
description: He's part of the group of friends surrounding [Izumi](https://anilist.co/character/155701) and [Shikimori](https://anilist.co/character/155702). He is honest, easy-going, and likes to have fun. He likes to play, but he is also a serious boy who studies hard.

name: Wade Wilson
nativeName: ウェイド・ウィルソン
description: Deadpool, whose real name is Wade Wilson, is a disfigured mercenary with the superhuman ability of an accelerated healing factor and physical prowess. The character is known as the "Merc with a Mouth" because of his tendency to talk and constantly joke, including breaking the fourth wall for humorous effect and running gags.

name: Yuria Harudera
description: She is a black ops operative who happens to be Yuuji's guardian and handler. Her former name is Julia Bardera but she changed it after moving to Japan, that’s why Yuuji calls her JB. Though she looks American, she is a mixed blood between German and Italian.

name: Zamasu
description: Zamasu is the Supreme Kai apprentice of Universe 10. Zamasu is noted to have similar ki to "Goku Black", and is in someway connected to him. ~!He is killed by Beerus in the altered flow of time, however, the present Zamasu was still alive, despite the flow of time having changed as the result of Future Trunks going back to the past. name: Chiyo Yumehara
description: A romantic and dreamy girl who easily falls in love with boys. She originally has a crush on Kusuo and tried her best to appeal to Kusuo. Kusuo in turn rejected her as hard as he could with his PSI powers. Kusuo even went as far as hooking her up with someone else but the relationship abruptly failed. She later develops a crush on Kaidou after he saved her from the unwanted attention of some guys at the beach.

description: She is seemingly emotionless girl from class 2-4 and is a member of the wind instruments club. She says she has no interest in love because she doesn't understand it. ~!She will start to have strange emotions towards her classmate Sugawara.!~

name: Hinako Mukaimizu
description: Hinako is a university student and loves surfing and is considerably skilled at it. Comes across as bright and carefree, but has insecurities about her own future.

name: Izumi Nase
description: __Height:__ 170 cm The eldest daughter of the Nase clan. She usually has a calm demeanor despite having a malicious undertone. She has the viewpoint that youmu are no different from crops or farm animals and exist solely to provide her clan with a livelihood. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Shima Nishina
description: Shima Nishina is a first-year high school student, fujoshi, mangaka and cosplayer. She's in class 1-4, and is known to be quite popular and crafty. She's a smooth talker and can easily appear likeable to her peers.

name: Usagi
description: A participant in the 12th Juuni Taisen burdened with the title of the 'rabbit' from the Chinese Zodiac. His details are a mystery.

name: Yeong-U Sin
description: __Country:__ South Korea Sin Yeong-U is the name of the main character in real life, while Greed is the in-game name. He was an unlucky loser in life. He entered into debt to buy the gaming capsule needed to play the game Satisfy. He experienced a hard life and was forced into manual labor jobs to pay off the enormous debt, but he still played the game despite not being good at it. name: Acnologia
description: Acnologia, also known as The Black Dragon of the Apocalypse, is an extremely powerful dragon that flies around the continent or world. It once faced Fairy Tail's strongest Mage, [Gildartz](https://anilist.co/character/29502), in battle, and was said to have instantly defeated him, tearing out several organs in the process. name: Akagi
description: Akagi-Class Aircraft Carrier. A threatening and easily jealous sadist with yandere tendencies. In the anime, she acts possessive towards her sister, Kaga, while in the game and other adaptions it’s towards the Commander.
